title: Integration with Gmail when column changes for a subitem it does not send the email
excerpt: I have currently integration with Gmail for when a column changes it sends an email to a person. It works great! But when there is a subitem created and the column in the subitem changes, it does not send the email as pe…

posts.author: JuiLiu (Jui Liu)
posts.cookedHtml: I have currently integration with Gmail for when a column changes it sends an email to a person. It works great! But when there is a subitem created and the column in the subitem changes, it does not send the email as per our integration.
